items.title: Jordan Clarkson got kicked out of a club after attempting to de-escalate a fight between Travis Scott and another clubgoer.
items.author: Naw726
items.body_excerpt: https://www.tmz.com/2026/07/19/jordan-clarkson-travis-scott-club-incident/ It seems Travis was fighting with someone in the club who was filming him and he and his entourage got into an altercation. Jordan Clarkson attempted to stop the fight but was apparently escorted out.

items.title: NEW YORK KNICKS RE-SIGN JORDAN CLARKSON
items.author: NBA.com
items.body_excerpt: NEW YORK KNICKS RE-SIGN JORDAN CLARKSON NBA.com

items.title: With Jordan Clarkson officially re-signed, all 8 of the Knicks' top-8 scorers (and 11 of thier top-12 scorers) from both the 2025-26 regular season and playoffs will be back in New York next season.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
With Jordan Clarkson officially re-signed, all 8 of the Knicks' top-8 scorers (and 11 of thier top-12 scorers) from both the 2025-26 regular season and playoffs will be back in New York next season.

Not easy to do that in today's NBA.

Almost like Leon had a plan.

#RunItBack
